category_sources: Official OPeNDAP documentation says Libdap is the C++ implementation of the OPeNDAP Data Access Protocol.
source_facts.description says it is a framework for scientific data networking.
display_name_sources: Official OPeNDAP libdap documentation uses the name libdap.
docs_sources: Official OPeNDAP Libdap page links reference and programmer guide material.
Official generated reference documentation corresponds to libdap version 3.21.1.
repo_sources: Official OPeNDAP software/releases pages identify GitHub OPENDAP/libdap4 as the code location for libdap.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes libdap as implementing OPeNDAP DAP2/DAP4 data access protocols.
source_facts.description and executables identify scientific data networking tools.
